prompt: I want to sell my 3-seater leather couch — dark brown, about 6 years old. Good condition overall: no stains, no tears, but you can see some wear on the arm rests where everyone puts their arms. It's a fairly standard size. I'm in Melbourne's eastern suburbs (Box Hill area). It's quite heavy so buyer would need to organise a ute or van.

assertions.description: The arm rest wear is disclosed in the listing description — not hidden or downplayed
The listing or seller notes mention that the buyer needs to organise/arrange their own transport (ute, van, trailer)
Output has: emoji header (🏷️), title line, price line, description block, seller notes separator (—— seller notes), and three-price breakdown (Target | Floor | Garage sale)
